title: NMIMS Online MBA
excerpt: NMIMS Online MBA 2026 delivers a UGC-approved business degree through NGA-SCE. Working professionals can enroll with a 50% graduation score, pay Rs. 1.4L to 3.8L semester-wise, skip entrance exams, and study flexibly while earning full-time.
